title: Sixes and the One Eyed King
original_title: Sixes and the One Eyed King
overview: Six contestants with suicidal tendencies are brougnt in to compete in a series of Russian Roulette style games by a Las Vegas gaming consortium. The winner will get $1 million each year for life.
